Database.//: Provider is Sqlite or Oracle. For production set Provider=Oracle and supply a real ConnectionString (e.g. via environment variable Database__ConnectionString or a secret store). Seed must be false against a real database.

ApiKeys.//: Supply keys via configuration/secret (e.g. ApiKeys__Keys__0). Set Enabled=false only on a trusted internal network.

Audit.//: Set Enabled=false when the target schema has no compatible audit table (the live DBO schema has no opc_action_log). Otherwise auditing self-disables after the first write failure.
